description_long: This is a rectangular wooden barn with a steeply pitched gable roof, situated on a patch of grassy terrain. The roof features prominent ridge beams and decorative end elements, possibly horns or finials, at both gable ends. The barn's exterior is clad in vertical wooden planks, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. A large, circular stone or millstone is positioned near one side of the barn, suggesting agricultural use. There are no visible windows, and the main entrance appears to be a single, wide door on the front facade. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground, with a clear, continuous base running along its perimeter.
description: A rustic wooden barn with a steep gable roof, vertical plank siding, and a large front entrance, set on grassy terrain. Decorative elements adorn the roof ends, and a stone feature sits beside the building.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wide entrance and decorative roof ends, with a stone feature visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the full length of the barn and the stone feature near the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with no visible doors or windows, and the decorative roof ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side gable view, similar to view 1 but with the stone feature now on the right.
